---
title: Home
---

# Some R Walkthroughs

This site provides access to some reminders of how to use R, based on what POLS students learned in the POLS 222 course. It also provides a few primers for additional utilities in R that go beyond the POLS 222 coursework, which will might be helpful for students completing their capstone projects. 

## Tutorials

- [Transforming Variables](TransformingVariables.html)
- [Chi-Square and Measures of Association](chi-square_measuresOfAssociation.html)
- [Ordinal and Multinomial Logit](ologit_mlogit.html)
